thought.text: 实际上，函数调用的语法规则需要正确处理参数列表。让我来修复它：

action.old_str:
postfixExpression
    :   primaryExpression  
    |   postfixExpression LeftParen assignmentExpression* Comma* RightParen
    |   postfixExpression LeftBracket expression RightBracket
    ;
action.new_str:
postfixExpression
    :   primaryExpression  
    |   postfixExpression LeftParen (assignmentExpression (Comma assignmentExpression)*)? RightParen
    |   postfixExpression LeftBracket expression RightBracket
    ;

tool_call.name: file_editor
tool_call.arguments:
{"command": "str_replace", "new_str": "postfixExpression
    :   primaryExpression  
    |   postfixExpression LeftParen (assignmentExpression (Comma assignmentExpression)*)? RightParen
    |   postfixExpression LeftBracket expression RightBracket
    ;", "old_str": "postfixExpression
    :   primaryExpression  
    |   postfixExpression LeftParen assignmentExpression* Comma* RightParen
    |   postfixExpression LeftBracket expression RightBracket
    ;", "path": "/workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4"}
